title: Farming Experience
description: The survival update that enhances everything you love is here, with a comprehensive overhaul of farming, cooking, and world generation features.
body:
[![Farming Experience Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pbF84hgG/images/3750f2df03ae4daab4b30a6de7b85381b4408e5c.png)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/K2v5Q)

![Farming Experience Logo](https://i.imgur.com/TmwuZvQ.png)

**The survival update that enhances everything you love is here**, with a comprehensive overhaul of farming, cooking, and world generation features. ## ✨ Features - 🌱 **Field day:** Wheat is just the beginning. There's now a massive menu of new vegetables to grow. Tomatoes, onions, cabbage, rice. - 🍎 **Now we're cooking:** Put down the raw beef. Combine ingredients in the cooking pot to make complex, delicious dishes. - 🪴 **Stairs aren't chairs:** And signs aren't armrests. Use a huge catalog of new blocks to decorate your base. Tables, shelves, lights, and details. - 🌎 **Love at first chunk:** World generation that actually generates excitement. Explore new biomes and structures that make every seed a keeper.
## 🛠️ Create a Server - Setting up a server for you and your friends is easier than you think. Read this guide on [how to set up your Farming Experience server](https://github.com/axperty/farmingexperience/wiki/Create-a-Server). [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
